takeProfitTiers.note: First money off the table — locks in gains before waiting for bigger tiers, prevents round-tripping winners back to breakeven.
Remaining ~11% of original position rides the trailing stop / hard SL / max-hold safety net.

cycle.note: Exit-only price checks against already-held positions run every 1s inside the loop — cheap (1 price lookup per open position per tick, no fresh market scan). Fresh candidate scanning for NEW entries still only happens once per 5-min job to avoid hammering DexScreener's discovery endpoint.
